_meta.author: Peter Higgins / Claude
_meta.purpose: Machine-readable cross-reference from Rogue Wave Audio (RWA) concepts and artifacts to their counterparts in the Higgins Unity Framework (HUF) repository. Reciprocal to the HUF-side ai-refresh/MASTER_LINEAGE.json.
_meta.reciprocal_document: HUF repo: ai-refresh/MASTER_LINEAGE.json — the complete arc of discovery with timeline, invariants carried forward, and cross-reference map in the other direction
_meta.founding_principle: The past is our strength and our future. The mathematics HUF formalizes was discovered empirically in this lab first, for loudspeakers. Every HUF concept has an ancestor here.

rwa.role: Engineering home. Where the instrument was built. Loudspeaker diffraction correction, BTL studio lab, DADC-DADI-ADAC chain, Higgins Operator H₁, concept R&D.

huf.role: Scientific framework home. Where the physics became compositional data analysis. MC-4 composition monitoring, EITT, CoDa formalization, cross-domain validation, governance doctrine.

cross_reference_map._purpose: Each RWA concept/artifact points to its HUF counterpart (or notes the absence). Reading this file tells you what RWA work the HUF repo is building on.

DADC_DADC_Dimensional_Apportioned_Diffra.huf_counterpart: MC-4 (Composition Monitoring — the fourth monitoring category) and the shape/magnitude decomposition in science/eitt/EITT_WHY_IT_WORKS.md §7
DADC_DADC_Dimensional_Apportioned_Diffra.relationship: The gain vector (G_H, G_W, G_D) / 6.02 dB is a 3-simplex composition. The shape/magnitude split between gains (apportionment) and corner frequencies (scale) is exactly what HUF's shape/magnitude decomposition generalizes. DADC was doing CoDa before CoDa was named.

DADI_Dimensional_Apportioned_Diffraction.huf_counterpart: EITT inversion diagnostic (when entropy invariance fails at dimension K, increase K for hidden dimensions or decrease K for non-stationarity)
DADI_Dimensional_Apportioned_Diffraction.relationship: DADI inverts the acoustic response to recover physical dimensions. When the inversion fails it diagnoses either a hidden dimension or a non-stationary condition. EITT inversion does the same thing for temporal data: when decimation-invariance fails, the direction of the failure tells you what's wrong.

ADAC_Adaptive_Dimensional_Apportioning_C.rwa_location: Implied in the DADC-DADI-ADAC chain documented in docs/papers/
ADAC_Adaptive_Dimensional_Apportioning_C.huf_counterpart: HUF-GOV / HUF-CLS fork documented in briefings/THE_LINEAGE.md and throughout the HUF governance architecture
ADAC_Adaptive_Dimensional_Apportioning_C.relationship: ADAC is where the engineering instinct to close the feedback loop met the discipline to not close it automatically. HUF-GOV (open-loop, stateless, scientific) and HUF-CLS (closed-loop, stateful, control) are the two paths from that fork. Same error signal, two architectures, a human decision between them.

BTL_Binaural_Test_Lab.huf_counterpart: science/loudspeaker-analogy/ in the HUF repo, plus the concepts/btl-lab-study/ in RWA (new, proposes the Advanced ODL stereo pair as a cross-validation platform)
BTL_Binaural_Test_Lab.relationship: BTL is the physical lab where measurement instincts and compositional mathematics met. Every HUF methodological claim can be referenced back to what BTL measurements demonstrated.

Higgins_Operator_H1.huf_counterpart: No single HUF document corresponds to H₁; it is the abstract-Hilbert-space generalization that bridges DADC (acoustic) and HUF (compositional time series). Applications listed in the H₁ paper — CCC cosmology, Toronto urban resilience, EUV lithography, Planck CMB, stellar fusion — are all compositional monitoring problems in different clothes.
Higgins_Operator_H1.relationship: H₁'s unity-normalization + directional-coherence preservation is the operator-theoretic statement of 'parts sum to constant, directional information is preserved, measurement is inert.' HUF's entropy preservation under geometric-mean decimation (EITT) is a specific instance.

Isotropic_Principle.rwa_location: Implicit in BTL design and DADC formulation; named explicitly in HUF's briefings/THE_LINEAGE.md
Isotropic_Principle.rwa_origin: The acoustic ground state: at low frequencies, omnidirectional radiation distributes energy equally across 4π steradian
Isotropic_Principle.huf_counterpart: The barycenter of the simplex (1/D, 1/D, ..., 1/D); maximum-entropy composition; the reference state every departure is measured against
Isotropic_Principle.relationship: Same idea, different coordinates. RWA found it in radiation patterns; HUF generalized it to any compositional system's ground state.

Paired_Measurement_Doctrine.rwa_location: Embedded in BTL measurement practice; named in HUF's briefings/THE_LINEAGE.md
Paired_Measurement_Doctrine.rwa_origin: Acoustic instinct: a flat frequency response can hide violent directional redistribution; one curve lies
Paired_Measurement_Doctrine.huf_counterpart: HUF's three-diagnostic protocol (Total Variation + Aitchison distance + coherence residual) in science/coda-monitoring/
Paired_Measurement_Doctrine.relationship: Same doctrine scaled from two metrics to three. Metric agreement = robustness. Metric disagreement = diagnostic information about the type of change.

entropix_concept_branch.relationship: Likely conceptual ancestor of EITT. The 'entropix' name predates the EITT acronym by months. Regime-balanced predictive systems was a named R&D thread before entropy-invariance-under-decimation was formalized.

regimes_concept_branch.huf_counterpart: HUF regime vocabulary throughout (HUF-GOV regimes, drift-flagged regimes, regime-shift detection in science/governance/)
regimes_concept_branch.relationship: Direct ancestor. HUF's regime concept is this RWA concept carried forward verbatim.

v_infinity_core_concept_branch.huf_counterpart: science/quantum/HUF_VCore_Stack_Brief_v1.0 — the V∞Core stack documentation referenced as part of the HUF operating manual
v_infinity_core_concept_branch.relationship: Direct name carry-through. V∞Core engine architecture from RWA becomes V∞Core stack in HUF.

tensor_acoustic_forge_concept_branch.huf_counterpart: Possibly the pipeline mindset behind chem_eitt_pipeline.py; no direct named equivalent in HUF
tensor_acoustic_forge_concept_branch.relationship: Conceptual adjacency rather than direct ancestor. Processing-pipeline approach to acoustic signals anticipates the processing-pipeline approach to compositional time series.

ai_reports_concept_branch.huf_counterpart: briefings/ folder in the HUF repo (accumulated per-AI briefings, cold-start tests, lit-verification briefings)
ai_reports_concept_branch.relationship: Same methodological instinct: preserve all AI exchanges systematically. The collective-AI working style that HUF formalized around five AIs (Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot) started as Grok reports in RWA.

BTL_Advanced_ODL_Lab_Study.huf_counterpart: Cross-validation platform for HUF methods against physical acoustic truth; connects to science/loudspeaker-analogy/ via shared measurement infrastructure
BTL_Advanced_ODL_Lab_Study.relationship: The physical-hardware realization of the RWA↔HUF alliance. A stereo pair of BTL Advanced Organic Digital Loudspeakers under Smaart v9 monitoring becomes a laboratory test bed where compositional-monitoring hypotheses can be validated against real acoustic data.

invariants_shared_across_repos._note: These are physical or methodological constants that appear identically in both repos, with the RWA origin documented and the HUF extension referencing it.

6.02_dB.rwa_role: Total baffle-step correction budget; the fixed sum across cabinet dimensions
6.02_dB.huf_role: Binary doubling; the 2:1 compression ratio as fundamental EITT test; primary decimation diagnostic

115_Hz_meter.huf_role: Scale constant linking compositional dimension to temporal autocorrelation length; block width M relates to characteristic timescale

Inert_Measurement_Principle.rwa_role: Non-contact diagnostic design: probe reads the object without imprinting its signature
Inert_Measurement_Principle.huf_role: 'HUF is inert.' Open-loop governance by architectural mechanism, not philosophical choice

Sum_Equals_Constant_Closure.rwa_role: Gains sum to exactly 6.02 dB across cabinet dimensions
Sum_Equals_Constant_Closure.huf_role: Simplex closure constraint: compositional parts sum to κ = 1 (or any fixed constant)

maintenance.update_rule: When the RWA repo adds new concepts, artifacts, or papers, add an entry to cross_reference_map. When the HUF repo formalizes a new capability with an RWA ancestor, note the ancestor here.
maintenance.reciprocal_file: The HUF-side ai-refresh/MASTER_LINEAGE.json should be kept in sync. When this file changes, update the corresponding entry there.
maintenance.cold_start_protocol: Any AI starting work on either repo should read this file plus the reciprocal MASTER_LINEAGE.json to understand the full arc.
